Phase 1 + 3
Total255 homes — 3 tiers
Estate (40)½ ac · 4,000–5,500 SF · $900K–$1.3M
Premium (105)⅓ ac · 3,000–4,000 SF · $650K–$900K
Standard (110)¼ ac · 2,200–3,200 SF · $450K–$650K
  • Hamlet clusters around cobblestone courtyards
  • Deep covered porches, haint blue ceilings
  • Limestone, brick & stucco — built to last 200 years
  • EV-ready garage, rear alley access
  • Edible landscaping — no sod
Sellout ~$186M. Attainable luxury for the New Black Middle Class of Atlanta. Every home within 400 feet of a trail.
Phase 2
Units840 units
Price Range$320K – $520K
Size1,600 – 2,400 SF
Layout3-story · 3–4 BD
  • French Beaux-Arts row homes — full limestone facade
  • Private rooftop terrace standard on all units
  • Wrought iron Juliet balconies
  • 2-car attached garage
Sellout ~$353M. Largest residential product — creates the density that drives $12.2M+ commercial NOI.
Phase 2 + 3
Units360 units
HOPA55+ Age-Qualified
Price Range$245K – $470K
Size900 – 1,800 SF
Types1–3 BD (no studios)
  • Above Village retail — step out onto cobblestone
  • Limestone quoins, arched retail openings
  • Wrought iron balconies, cobblestone plaza below
  • Concierge services, secure parking
Entry at ~$220K. Residents live above the pulse of the Village. First-time buyers, investors, empty-nesters.
Phase 2
Size80,000 SF
Membership1,500+ · $200–$300/mo
Annual Revenue$4.8M–$6.5M
  • Copper barrel-vault roof — visual anchor of the plan
  • 6-lane lap pool + leisure pool + cold plunge
  • 30,000 SF cardio & weight floor
  • 6 pickleball + 2 NBA courts
  • Yoga lawn, steam, sauna, recovery
Life Time–caliber. No comparable facility within 20 miles of South Fulton. Open to residents and the broader market.
Phase 1
Size22,000 SF
Modalities9 categories
Annual Revenue$2.8M/year
Diamond Membership$340/mo
  • Float therapy, salt room, head spa

  • Chiropractic, facial studio
Opens Phase 1. The exhale of the community. No comparable within 20 miles — draws regional membership far beyond residents.
Phase 1 + 2
Size65,000 SF
NNN Rent$55–$65 PSF avg
Annual Revenue$3.2M–$4.5M
Minority Leasing40% reserved
  • Farm-to-table restaurant, open kitchen visible
  • Natural foods market & apothecary
  • Barbershop, co-working, inn above the street
  • Heavy timber farmers market pavilion
  • Clock tower, walled meditation garden
40% reserved for minority-owned businesses. A real village — not a retail concept. The social soul of Hawks Ridge.

Preserved96 acres · deed-restricted in perpetuity

  • 15-ac Central Meadow & stone amphitheater

Deed-restricted in perpetuity. The green spine protects every home value for the next 50 years.
All Phases
Main EntryGated · 24/7 staffed
SurveillanceHD camera network
Access ControlLicense plate recognition
DesignCPTED principles
  • Gated community — staffed main entry 24/7
  • HD camera network + license plate recognition
  • Roving security patrol — vehicle and foot
  • Emergency call stations on trails
  • CPTED design — natural sightlines, no blind spots
Safety & Security. CPTED Design · 24/7 Patrol · Smart Access. A community designed for peace of mind.
